result.stdout:
ApproveIt Console CLI 1.0.1.0

Usage:

    approveit <command> <target> [options]

Command List:

    > help: Show command line help. Write ` approveit help <command> `
    > install: Install approveit console app.
    > run: Run approveit console app.
    > terminate: Terminate and shut down approveit.

To get a detailed help for a command:

    approveit help <command>

Tenant name is missing!


Usage:
  approveit run -u <username> -p <password> -t <tenantname>
  approveit run -u <username> -p <password> -t <tenantname> -f

Example:

  force approveit to run. If it is already running it will shut down the process and start again.
  approveit run -u <username> -p <password> -t <tenantname> -f
